name: hethongagent
description: Desktop coding-agent workspace built from the LangGraph/OpenHands research flow.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/preload.js && node --check src/main/pythonEngine.js && node --check src/main/agentPipeline.js && node --check src/main/llmClient.js && node --check src/main/sessionStore.js && node --check src/main/settingsStore.js && node --check src/main/workspace.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m compileall engine
